race.comment: Siding with CALL TO GLORY (2) who comes back in grade from last start at Caulfield heath when leading and fading behind a very talented horse in Tennessee Bound. The two efforts to start the campaign make him the one to beat and he can bounce back. BAZZAR (10) got home well enough first up at Ballarat over 1100m and should come on from that, he's got upside and can improve. TAPO (6) was okay fresh at Swan Hill during the carnival and this doesn't look any tougher, go well. HOLLYWOODBOULEVARD (5) returned from a layoff last start and was beaten 5.5 lengths into sixth over 1000m at Sale. Fitter and can run a bold race.
